overall_summary: Big gap to reference, but the data shows exactly where it is hiding. Attack these points. Current gap: 15.943s slower than reference. The biggest opportunity is Sector 1 (+11.322s), where 89.1 km/h is being left on the table through the corners. Executing these fixes could recover 1.69s — a completely different lap time.

priority_actions.issue: Apex speed is 42.9 km/h below reference (51.5 vs 94.4 km/h). Significant corner exit speed deficit.
priority_actions.instruction: Despite a late brake point, apex speed is below reference — car not rotating. Use higher initial brake pressure to pitch the car in, trail off through apex. Hit 94 km/h and the exit speed takes care of itself.
priority_actions.evidence: Apex: 51.5 km/h vs 94.4 km/h reference (-42.9 km/h).

priority_actions.issue: Apex speed is 8.9 km/h below reference (45.5 vs 54.4 km/h). Significant corner exit speed deficit.
priority_actions.instruction: Despite a late brake point, apex speed is below reference — car not rotating. Use higher initial brake pressure to pitch the car in, trail off through apex. Hit 54 km/h and the exit speed takes care of itself.
priority_actions.evidence: Apex: 45.5 km/h vs 54.4 km/h reference (-8.9 km/h).

priority_actions.issue: Losing 4.7 km/h at the apex (60.8 vs 65.5 km/h).
priority_actions.instruction: Carry more speed to the apex — target 66 km/h. Take a wider entry to enable a later apex and trust the exit. This corner is where straight-line speed is won or lost.

priority_actions.issue: Throttle pick-up is 35m later than reference after the apex.
priority_actions.instruction: Get back to full throttle 35m earlier. Reference applies throttle at 2710m, driver at 2745m. Trust the apex and commit — late throttle bleeds straight-line speed.

sector_feedback.headline: Minimum corner speed is 89.1 km/h below reference — driver is over-slowing significantly through this sector.
sector_feedback.details: Average throttle application is 19% lower than reference — driver is hesitant getting back on power.

sector_feedback.headline: Carrying 4.7 km/h less than reference through corners — small gains available at each apex.
